fix: copy startup-timer.cjs to desktop dist for packaged app startup

The launcher looks for startup-timer.cjs next to the bundled main.cjs.
In the packaged app, this file was missing, causing a fallback to a
minimal inline preload that lacks the plugin-sdk resolution optimization.
Without it, jiti babel-transforms the 17 MB plugin-sdk on every startup,
adding ~60s to gateway startup time.

Fix: copy the full startup-timer.cjs from packages/gateway/dist/ during
the desktop tsdown build.

fix(windows): handle stale PID locks and TUI console input (#790)

Fix two Windows-specific issues:

1. process_lock: os.kill(pid, 0) raises OSError (WinError 87) on
   Windows for stale/invalid PIDs instead of ProcessLookupError.
   This prevented the server from reclaiming stale lock files after
   a crash, blocking startup with no clear recovery path. (#650)

2. rust_cli: os.execv() on Windows does not replace the current
   process — CPython's MSVC implementation spawns a child instead.

fix: add file locking to history writes + backfill missing record IDs (#2817)

History records were being silently lost when concurrent spawn processes
did load→modify→save simultaneously (last writer wins, first record
vanishes). This explains records disappearing from `spawn list`.

Changes:
- Add mkdir-based advisory file locking (withHistoryLock) around all
  write operations: saveSpawnRecord, saveLaunchCmd, saveMetadata,
  markRecordDeleted, removeRecord, updateRecordIp, updateRecordConnect

Add OPENCLAW_PROFILE to systemd templates and deploy-workspace.sh

Root cause fix: each Discord bot needs OPENCLAW_PROFILE={instance} in
systemd to use ~/.openclaw/workspace-{profile} instead of Main's workspace.
Without this, all bots read Main's SOUL.md and think they're Alpha.

- Added OPENCLAW_PROFILE to all 4 systemd service templates
- Created deploy-workspace.sh for safe workspace file deployment
  (auto-backup, correct paths, session clear, restart)
- Updated CLAUDE.md with workspace sep

feat(whatsapp-gateway): add owner routing for external DM responses (#1266)

* feat(whatsapp-gateway): add owner routing for external DM responses

When a DM arrives from an external contact (not the owner), redirect the
agent's response to the owner's JID instead of replying back to the
external sender. This prevents the bot from accidentally sending
owner-intended messages (e.g. "Signore, il negozio ha risposto...") to
shops, services, or strangers.

The owner JID is configured via the WHATSAP

fix: GenerateTaskInsight on gossip auto-approve path

The task object passed to GenerateTaskInsight had stale status='submitted'
because it was fetched before ApproveTask(). Re-fetch after approve so the
insight check (status=='approved') passes.

Also adds GenerateTaskInsight call to autoApproveSimpleTask — previously
only the HTTP approve handler generated insights, missing all simple-mode
tasks that auto-approve via gossip.

Fix arithmetic syntax error in run-model.sh fallback size estimation

The du -BG output includes the file path, so grep -oP '\d+' was matching
digits in filenames (e.g., "18 4 7 4 5 4" for glm-4.7-flash-claude-4.5-opus).
Use cut -f1 to isolate the size column before stripping non-digits.

fix(ci): use pull_request_target so Qodo review runs on fork PRs (#816)

pull_request event blocks fork PRs behind manual approval and denies
access to secrets, so DOUBAO_API_KEY is unavailable and the review
silently fails. pull_request_target runs in the base-repo context,
giving the workflow access to secrets while still executing the
workflow file from main (not from the fork), which keeps the API key
safe.

Add dynamic DPI watcher for runtime Selkies adjustments

watch-dpi.sh monitors ~/.xsettingsd via inotifywait. When Selkies
updates the DPI (e.g., a HiDPI client connects to a 96-DPI
container, or vice versa), dynamically adjusts:
- LXQt panel size and icon size
- LXQt session.conf font_dpi
- Openbox theme padding (creates/restores HiDPI theme)

This makes DPI fully adaptive: container can start at any DPI
and automatically adjust when clients with different DPIs connect.

Also adds inotify-tools

fix: enforce tool gate at runtime — oe-runtime install order + web_search/web_fetch block

Root cause: _install_extension() ran before _configure_agent_models(), which
did load→modify→write on openclaw.json and overwrote the plugins config that
the CLI had just written. oe-runtime was silently dropped from plugins.allow
and plugins.entries on every install.

Changes:
- Move _install_extension() after all _write_openclaw_config callers
- Add _verify_extension_in_config() post-install check
- Add
meta: aerobase-travel-lounges v3.2.0
skill: aerobase-travel-lounges v3.2.0

fix: use pure-Go TLS verification to avoid macOS SecPolicyCreateSSL stale handle

Long-running dashboard processes on macOS hit "SecPolicyCreateSSL error: 0"
when the Security framework handle becomes stale (e.g. after system updates).
Explicitly load the system cert pool into the HTTP client's TLS config so Go
uses its own certificate verification instead of delegating to macOS.

Also set CGO_ENABLED=0 in the default build target for consistency with
build-all.

Change SELKIES_SCALING_DPI default from 192 to 96

DPI=192 causes oversized panel/theme on non-Retina screens, and
these static changes (panel.conf, Openbox theme) can't be
dynamically reverted when Selkies adjusts DPI at runtime.

Default to 96 (standard) for broad compatibility. HiDPI/Retina
users should set SELKIES_SCALING_DPI=192 explicitly.

fix(recall): reduce hallucination from partial memory recall

Benchmark analysis (engram-v3, 50 probes) revealed 4.5x more
hallucinations vs baseline. Root cause: agent receives topic-level
recall ("there was a port split") but fabricates specifics (port 3000
instead of 4000) from common defaults.

Recall formatter:
- Tag memories with relevance < 0.5 as [PARTIAL — do not cite specifics]
- Update maturity guidance to warn against fabricating missing details

📦 发布 v1.6.5 + 自动版本管理机制

功能:
1. ✅ 更新版本号为 1.6.5（修复主题映射问题）
2. ✅ 添加 get_version() 函数自动从 git 获取版本
3. ✅ 创建 update_version.py 自动更新版本号
4. ✅ 创建 VERSIONING.md 版本文档

自动化机制:
- 窗口标题自动显示 git 版本号
- 优先使用 git describe 获取版本
- fallback 到硬编码 __version__
- 运行 python update_version.py 自动递增版本

使用流程:
1. 完成修改
2. python update_version.py (自动递增)
3. git add . && git commit
4. git push origin main --tags

测试:
- git describe 输出：v1.6.5-dirty ✅

with an unanswered user message, and sending a new prompt causes consecutive
user-role messages → Anthropic API error.

  with SessionManagerLike interface (enables unit testing without pimono)

Support DPI scaling for all three DEs (LXQt, XFCE, KDE)

Previous set-dpi.sh only wrote .Xresources and .xsettingsd,
which didn't work for XFCE (uses xfconf, not xsettingsd) or
KDE (needs kdeglobals ScaleFactor + kcmfonts forceFontDPI).

Now detects DE at init time (matching Selkies detection order)
and applies DE-specific configuration:
- LXQt: .Xresources + .xsettingsd (unchanged)
- XFCE: .Xresources + xfconf xsettings.xml (pre-populate XML
  since xfconfd isn't running at init time)
- KDE: .X

Add local fallback embedding to Context Encoder

Context Encoder now works without any API key using deterministic
character n-gram hashing. Similar text produces similar vectors
(cosine 0.856 for related contexts, ~0 for unrelated).

Two modes:
- Local (default): zero cost, no network, no dependencies
- API (OPENAI_API_KEY set): high-quality OpenAI embeddings

Local mode enables meaningful coupling out of the box — agents
discussing similar topics align naturally without API costs.

The proactive behavior instructions caused OpenClaw daemons to
poll the mesh service in background loops, burning API tokens
(3.2M tokens, 121 sessions from just a few test chats).

relevant. No background polling. Mesh service handles sync
automatically.

feat: 优化对话摘要格式，增加解决思路和执行步骤

## LLM Prompt 优化
- 新增 💡 解决思路 章节（分析问题过程、技术方案选择）
- 新增 🔧 执行步骤 章节（逐步执行列表）
- 优化 📁 相关文件 格式（带修改说明）

## Fallback 启发式提取优化
- 提取解决步骤（首先/然后/接着/最后等关键词）
- 提取文件路径及上下文描述
- 结构化输出：问题→思路→步骤→命令→代码→文件

## 摘要格式示例
```markdown
## ❓ 用户问题
用户遇到的具体问题

## 💡 解决思路
通过分析问题，采用以下方案解决...

## 🔧 执行步骤
1. 第一步做什么...
2. 第二步做什么...

### 执行的命令
```bash
命令列表
```

### 关键代码
```typescript
代码片段
```

## 📁 相关文件
- `/path/to/file` - 修改说明
```

text extraction even when the underlying model supports native PDF.

messages with no user notification.

fix: register sandbox jobs in ContextManager for query tool visibility (#1426)

* fix: register sandbox jobs in ContextManager for query tool visibility

Sandbox jobs created via execute_sandbox() were persisted to the database
but never registered in the in-memory ContextManager. Since all query tools
(list_jobs, job_status, job_events, cancel_job) only search the
ContextManager, sandbox jobs were invisible to the agent despite running
successfully in Docker containers.

fix: add /home/node/.openclaw/bin to container PATH

Skill detection and CLI commands inside the container use the process PATH,
not the tools.exec.pathPrepend config (which only applies to agent tool
calls). Without this, custom-installed binaries (spogo, gh, jq, rg) are
invisible to 'openclaw skills list' and skills remain marked as missing,
preventing their instructions from being injected into the agent context.

- Using require() bypasses ESM loader and works correctly on Windows

fix(channels): automatic reconnection after network outage

Previously, when internet dropped and returned, channels (especially Slack)
could fail to reconnect and required a full oxicrab restart.

Root cause: each channel had internal reconnection loops, but if the loop
exited unexpectedly (panic, unrecoverable error during setup), there was
no supervisor to restart it.

Two-part fix:

1. Make channel loops defensive:
   - Slack: move auth.test into reconnection loop (was pre-spawn, failed

fix(skills): preserve TOML [[tools]] in Compact prompt injection mode (#4032)

In Compact (MetadataOnly) mode, skill tools were omitted from the system
prompt alongside instructions. This meant the LLM had no visibility into
TOML-defined tools when running in Compact mode, defeating the primary
advantage of TOML skills over MD skills (structured tool metadata).

Now Compact mode skips only instructions (loaded on demand via
read_skill) while still inlining tool definitions so the LLM knows
which

fix: Follow-up logic persists after /stop trigger (#6656)

/stop 设置 agent_stop_requested 标记，但 runner 直到当前工具调用
超时才从 _ACTIVE_AGENT_RUNNERS 注销。在此窗口期内，用户发的新消息
被 try_capture_follow_up() 当作 follow-up 吞掉。

在 follow-up 捕获前检查 stop 标记：一旦用户请求停止，就不再把后续
消息注入到正在终止的 agent 上下文中。

fix(security): validate embedding base URLs to prevent SSRF (#1221)

* fix(security): validate embedding base URLs to prevent SSRF (#1103)

User-configurable base URLs (OLLAMA_BASE_URL, EMBEDDING_BASE_URL) were
passed directly to reqwest with no validation, allowing SSRF attacks
against cloud metadata endpoints, internal services, or file:// URIs.

Adds validate_base_url() that rejects:
- Non-HTTP(S) schemes (file://, ftp://)
- HTTP to non-localhost destinations (prevents credential leakage)
- H

feat(spotify): replace spotify_player with spogo for Spotify skill

spotify_player (v0.17.2) used deprecated librespot password auth which
Spotify no longer accepts for OAuth-linked accounts (Google, Yahoo, etc.).
v0.18+ requires GLIBC_2.38 but the container has 2.36. No musl build exists.

spogo is a statically compiled Go CLI that uses the Spotify Web API via
browser session cookies (sp_dc + sp_t). No glibc dependency, works with
any sign-in method, no audio libraries needed.

fix(observer): pass RequestContext through vikingdb observer for tenant-scoped vector count (#807)

VikingDBObserver.count() was called without RequestContext, falling back
to account_id="default" and filtering out vectors from other tenants.
Thread ctx from the HTTP router through ObserverService and VikingDBObserver
so each tenant only sees their own vector count.

Closes #786

fix: 重命名 NotificationManager 避免与系统类冲突

问题根因：
- 自定义 NotificationManager 类与 android.app.NotificationManager 同名
- 导致类型转换和常量引用时的命名冲突

修复方案：
- 重命名为 ClawChatNotificationManager

fix: f32→f64 precision artifact in temperature causes provider 400 errors (#1450)

* fix: f32→f64 precision artifact in temperature causes provider 400 errors

Direct f32-as-f64 preserves the binary representation, producing values
like 0.699999988079071 instead of 0.7. Some OpenAI-compatible providers
(e.g. Zhipu GLM-5) reject these with a 400 error. Add round_f32_to_f64()
that formats to 6 decimal places before parsing back to f64.

🐛 修复 resizable 配置类型错误

问题:
- TclError: expected boolean value but got "0 0"
- 原因：root.resizable() 返回元组 (width, height)，不是布尔值

修复:
1. 保存配置时：将元组转换为布尔值
   - bool(resizable_state[0]) if isinstance(resizable_state, tuple)
2. 加载配置时：兼容旧配置的非布尔值
   - bool(resizable_raw) if not isinstance(resizable_raw, bool)

这样确保：
- resizable 始终是布尔值
- 兼容旧配置文件
- 避免 Tkinter 类型错误

server was not visible to Claude because of two issues:

claw: fix double collection causing list corruption and test failure

claw_tools_init() was calling claw_tool_core_collect_from_section()
which re-registered the same tool structs already collected by
claw_init(). Re-registering corrupts the linked list because
claw_list_init() resets node pointers while the node is still linked.

In the unit test context (where claw_init() is not called), the
collect call registered ~15 production tools including the scheduler
tool whose init() creates FreeRTOS

fix(agent): prevent memory context duplication by reordering operations (#2649)

Swap auto_save and load_context order to avoid retrieving the just-stored
user message in memory recall.

Before: load_context → auto_save (could retrieve own message)
After: auto_save → load_context (query first, store after)

This fixes the issue where "[Memory context]\n- user_msg: <current>\n<current>"
would appear, causing the user's input to be duplicated.

fix(channel): remove dead AtomicU32 fallback in channels mod (#3521)

The conditional cfg branches for AtomicU32 (32-bit fallback) and
AtomicU64 (64-bit) became dead code after portable_atomic::AtomicU64
was adopted in bd757996. The AtomicU32 branch would fail to compile
on 32-bit targets because the import was removed but the usage remained.

Use portable_atomic::AtomicU64 unconditionally, which works on all
targets.

Fixes #3452

Co-authored-by: SpaceLobster <spacelobster@SpaceLobsters-Mac-min

fix(channel): align Matrix reply channel key with dispatch key (#3522)

The Matrix channel was setting `channel: format!("matrix:{}", room_id)`
on incoming messages, but the reply router looks up channels by name
using `channels_by_name.get(&msg.channel)` where the key is just
"matrix". This mismatch caused replies to silently drop.

Align with how all other channels (telegram, discord, slack, etc.)
set the channel field to just the channel name.

Closes #3477

Co-authored-by: SpaceLobster <spac

fix(packaging): ensure Homebrew var directory exists on first start (#3524)

* fix(packaging): ensure Homebrew var directory exists on first start

When zeroclaw is installed via Homebrew, the service plist references
/opt/homebrew/var/zeroclaw (or /usr/local/var/zeroclaw on Intel) for
runtime data, but this directory was never created. This caused
`brew services start zeroclaw` to fail on first use.

The fix detects Homebrew installations by checking if the binary lives
under a Homebrew prefix

fix: remove Phase 2.6 entry.js preload to fix Electron CJS/ESM crash

Phase 2.6 injected require() calls into the ESM entry.js to pre-load
plugin-sdk into require.cache, bypassing jiti's 13s babel overhead.

This caused ERR_INTERNAL_ASSERTION in Electron's Node.js (nodejs/node
#53454, #60211): when the same module is loaded via both require() (CJS,
from the injected preload) and import() (ESM, from gateway code or
extensions), Node.js's CJS/ESM translator hits an internal assertion.

fix: strip channel envelope metadata before smart extraction (#259)

* fix: strip channel envelope metadata before smart extraction

OpenClaw channels (Feishu, Telegram, etc.) inject system metadata envelopes
into conversation context — message IDs, sender IDs, timestamps, and JSON
blocks. When smartExtraction passes this text to the extraction LLM, weaker
models (e.g. qwen3.5-plus) cannot distinguish metadata from user content
and store the envelopes as memories, polluting the vector database.

fix(config): handle tilde expansion in non-TTY environments (cron) (#3849)

When HOME environment variable is not set (common in cron jobs or
other non-TTY environments), `shellexpand::tilde` returns the literal
`~` unexpanded. This caused SOUL.md, IDENTITY.md, and other workspace
files to not be loaded because the workspace_dir path was invalid.

This fix adds `expand_tilde_path()` helper that falls back to
`directories::UserDirs` when shellexpand fails to expand tilde.
If both methods fail, a
fix: harden replay persistence

fix(docker): remove conflicting .dockerignore entries (closes #3836) (#3844)

The Dockerfile requires firmware/ and crates/robot-kit/ for the build:
- crates/robot-kit/Cargo.toml is needed for workspace manifest parsing
- firmware/ is copied as part of the build context

These entries in .dockerignore caused COPY commands to fail with
"file not found" errors, resulting in 100% Docker build failure.

修复 #6196

当对话只有一条 user 消息（长 tool chain 场景：system → user → assistant
→ tool → assistant → tool → ...），三个截断方法都会把这条 user 消息丢掉，
导致智谱、Gemini 等要求 user 消息的 provider 返回 400。

改动：
- 提取 `_split_system_rest()` 去掉三个方法里重复的 system/non-system 拆分
- 新增 `_ensure_user_message()`：截断后如果没有 user 了，从原始消息里补回
  第一条 user，避免违反 API 格式要求
- 删掉 `truncate_by_dropping_oldest_turns` 里把没有 user 就清空全部消息的逻辑

fix: 全局信任 Gateway 证书，支持任意 IP 连接

问题：
- 原配置只信任特定 IP（192.168.0.213 等），无法适配不同用户的 Gateway 部署

解决方案：
- 在 <base-config> 中添加 Gateway 证书到全局信任锚
- 所有 HTTPS 连接都会信任 Gateway 自签名证书（CN=openclaw-gateway）
- 移除固定 IP 列表，仅保留 Tailscale 域名示例

影响范围：
- 任意 IP 地址（192.168.x.x, 10.x.x.x, 172.16.x.x 等）
- 任意域名（localhost, *.local, *.ts.net 等）
- 不影响正常 HTTPS（系统证书仍有效）

安全说明：
- Gateway 证书 CN=openclaw-gateway，不会被其他网站滥用
- 双重保护：network_security_config.xml + GatewayTrustManager.kt

fix(provider): disable native tool calling for Venice (#4016)

Venice's API accepts the OpenAI-compatible tool format without error
but models ignore the tool specs and hallucinate tool usage in prose
instead. Disable native tool calling so Venice uses prompt-guided
tools, which work reliably.

Add without_native_tools() builder method to OpenAiCompatibleProvider
for providers that support system messages but not native function
calling.

Closes #4007

fix(web): add clipboard fallback for HTTP contexts (#4015)

The copy button in the web dashboard silently failed when served over
HTTP because navigator.clipboard requires a secure context (HTTPS).
Add a textarea-based fallback using document.execCommand('copy') and
proper error handling for the clipboard promise.

Closes #4008

fix(channel): clear persisted JSONL session on /new command (#4014)

The /new command only cleared in-memory conversation history but left
the JSONL session file on disk. On daemon restart, stale history was
rehydrated, negating the user's session reset. This caused context
pollution and degraded tool calling reliability.

Add delete_session() to SessionStore and call it from the /new handler
so both in-memory and persisted state are cleared.

Closes #4009
